flags.name: Parchem Speed Rep
flags.evidence: No product named 'Speed Rep' exists in the current Parchem/Fosroc AU catalogue. Parchem's actual rapid cementitious repair mortars are the Renderoc range (Renderoc HB / HB40 / HB70). https://www.fosroc.com.au/product/renderoc-hb40 ; https://www.parchem.com.au/technical-data/

flags.name: Mapei Eco Prim T Plus
flags.evidence: Eco Prim T Plus is a single-component acrylic universal/levelling primer for absorbent and non-absorbent substrates ahead of smoothing/levelling compounds. It is NOT a moisture-suppression DPM (which must be a 2-part epoxy). Belongs with the levelling system, not moisture barriers. https://www.mapei.com/au/en/products-and-solutions/products/detail/eco-prim-t-plus

flags.name: Fosroc Nitoprime 28
flags.evidence: Nitoprime 28 is a two-component solvent-containing modified-epoxy bonding primer used with Fosroc repair compounds (Nitomortar HB, Nitocote ET550). It is an adhesion/bonding primer for repair mortars, not a moisture-suppression DPM. https://www.fosroc.com/product/show/nitoprime-28

flags.name: Parchem Epirez 510
flags.evidence: No current Parchem/Epirez product 'Epirez 510' could be verified in the AU catalogue. Current Epirez epoxy primer/sealer offerings carry other codes (e.g. Epirez 123 Primer/Sealer). Conservative flag pending a valid TDS. https://www.parchem.com.au/technical-data/ ; https://www.itwpf.com.au/epirez/technical-data/technical-data-sheets/

flags.name: Parchem Flowfill RS
flags.evidence: No self-levelling floor underlayment named 'Flowfill RS' is listed by Parchem/Fosroc AU. Parchem's actual self-smoothing floor underlayment is Durafloor Leveltop Rapid; 'Flowfill' in the Fosroc range denotes flowable void-fill/grout, not a flooring self-leveller. http://www.parchem.com.au/construction/product/concrete-underlayment-mortars/durafloor-leveltop-rapid/i/92

recommendations.name: Scanmaskin Scan Combiflex 650
recommendations.reason: Widely used AU contractor-grade planetary grinder for removing old magnesite/adhesive residues and profiling concrete prior to DPM application.

recommendations.name: Husqvarna PG 450
recommendations.reason: Common AU-available planetary grinder one step up from the PG 280; suited to larger magnesite removal/preparation areas. https://www.husqvarnaconstruction.com

recommendations.name: Fosroc Renderoc HB40
recommendations.type: Polymer-modified high-build cementitious repair mortar (EN 1504-3 R3)
recommendations.reason: Real current Parchem/Fosroc AU repair mortar to replace the fabricated 'Speed Rep'. https://www.fosroc.com.au/product/renderoc-hb40

recommendations.name: Ardex A 38
recommendations.reason: Fast-setting AU patch/screed for filling magnesite removal voids before levelling; complements Feather Finish for deeper fills. https://ardexaustralia.com

recommendations.name: Mapei Mapeproof Primer
recommendations.type: Two-part epoxy moisture barrier / DPM primer
recommendations.reason: Current Mapei AU epoxy moisture-barrier primer; correct DPM class product for chloride/moisture-laden magnesite slabs (replaces the misplaced acrylic Eco Prim T Plus). https://www.mapei.com/au/en/products-and-solutions/products/detail/mapeproof-primer

recommendations.name: Mapei Triblock P
recommendations.reason: Epoxy-cementitious DPM primer for damp substrates with high residual humidity; well suited to magnesite-affected slabs. https://www.mapei.com/au/en/products-and-solutions/lines/screeds-and-preparation-of-floor-substrates/category/moisture-barriers

recommendations.name: Ardex WPM 300
recommendations.reason: AU-available Ardex epoxy moisture-barrier alternative/back-up to MC Rapid for suppressing high RH/MVER on remediated slabs. https://ardexaustralia.com

recommendations.name: Parchem Durafloor Leveltop Rapid
recommendations.reason: Real current Parchem/Fosroc AU self-levelling underlayment to replace the unverified 'Flowfill RS'. http://www.parchem.com.au/construction/product/concrete-underlayment-mortars/durafloor-leveltop-rapid/i/92

recommendations.name: Ardex K 55
recommendations.type: Rapid-drying cementitious self-levelling and smoothing compound
recommendations.reason: Current AU Ardex self-leveller suited over moisture-barrier-primed magnesite-remediated slabs. https://ardexaustralia.com/product/ardex-k-55/
